payload.answer: The transcript includes Sam-specific facts, preferences, an interaction, and an open loop: Sam left Goldman last month and joined Point72; Sam still listens to Bill Evans but lately more early Coltrane; Daniele and Sam discussed catching up about AI infra; and Sam asked Daniele to send the article.
citations: Daniele: Still at Goldman? Sam: No, I left Goldman last month and joined Point72.
Daniele: Still listening to Bill Evans? Sam: Yes, but lately more early Coltrane.
Daniele: We should catch up about AI infra. Sam: Definitely, send me that article.
